task: During the push for the metadata session, fetchAndMergeSessionsCommon does a fetch upstream in order to ensure the latest exists locally. Change the fetch logic so that it does a partial fetch and only returns the trees and commits, instead of the entire changeset (e.g. blobs).
user_feedback_text: During the push for the metadata session, fetchAndMergeSessionsCommon does a fetch upstream in order to ensure the latest exists locally. Change the fetch logic so that it does a partial fetch and only returns the trees and commits, instead of the entire changeset (e.g. blobs).
